title: Your Dashboard Can't Tell You What's Wrong | Daniel Fox
meta_description: Declining return on ad spend has three different causes and one identical-looking graph. Why analytics flag the symptom, and where the real diagnosis actually happens.

schema.headline: Your dashboard can tell you something is wrong. It can't tell you what.
schema.description: Declining return on ad spend has three different causes and one identical-looking graph. Why analytics flag the symptom, and where the real diagnosis happens.
